description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a classic black-and-white color scheme, featuring a white body and black rear section. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent roof-mounted light bar displaying red and blue emergency lights, as well as matching colored lights integrated into the front grille. The word 'POLICE' is clearly marked in gold on both front doors. The car has detailed wheels, side mirrors, and tinted windows, suggesting a realistic urban patrol vehicle. The overall design is streamlined, with smooth body panels and a robust, authoritative presence.
description: A black-and-white four-door police car with a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, gold 'POLICE' markings on the doors, and detailed wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille with red and blue lights, windshield, and the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'POLICE' text on the door, the black rear, and the full roof light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the trunk, taillights, and the back of the roof light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'POLICE' text and the black rear section visible.
attribute_police_markings: The word 'POLICE' is displayed in gold capital letters on both front doors. No other department names, numbers, or additional law enforcement identifiers are visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue segments is present, as well as matching red and blue lights integrated into the front grille. The light bar is rectangular and centrally placed on the roof.
